book.ars_arcane_matrix.matrix_core.overv: The $(item)Arcane Matrix Core$() is an endgame Source generator crafted with an Enchanting Apparatus. Place it at the center of three mutually perpendicular 5 by 5 rings made from Source Gem Blocks.$(br2)It stores generated Source internally.
documentation.ars_arcane_matrix.matrix_c: The Arcane Matrix Core is an endgame Source generator crafted with an Enchanting Apparatus. Build three mutually perpendicular 5 by 5 rings around the core using Source Gem Blocks. It stores generated Source internally.
